name: claude-setup
description: Onboard Claude Code to a new machine or project, validate an existing setup, run a settings.json config wizard, and scaffold ICM-structured projects. Ships four skills (setup-onboard, setup-audit, setup-config-wizard, setup-scaffold) plus hook/settings/ICM templates they draw from. All work is driven through Claude. Idempotent and non-destructive: settings.json is merged, never overwritten, and existing files are never clobbered.
